en: Let's practice English conversation Oh hey How was the record store It was
ko: 영어 대화 연습을 해보자 어 안녕 레코드 가게 어땠어?

en: awesome Thank you for the rec
Rec is short for recommendation Did you buy anything Uh yeah I wanted to buy the whole store
ko: Rec은 recommendation의 줄임말이야 뭐 샀어? 어 응 가게 전체를 사고 싶었어

en: I had to hold back I ended up with seven albums To hold back means not to
ko: 참아야 했어 결국 앨범 일곱 장 샀어 hold back은

en: do something that you're wanting to do Ooh let's listen to one tonight at dinner Okay for dinner
ko: 하고 싶은 걸 참는다는 뜻이야 우 오늘 저녁에 하나 듣자 좋아 저녁에

en: I think we're going to go with Robert Glasper Amazing jazz If you go
ko: Robert Glasper로 할까 봐 대단한 재즈야 go

en: with something that means you choose it Yes I love jazz
ko: with something은 그걸 선택한다는 뜻이야 좋아 나 재즈 좋아해
